channel.title: Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in HOMEPAGE on Portfolio

item.title: Projects
item.description:
CarbonManthan

Stack: Django, Python, PostgreSQL, Google App Engine
Links: GitHub | Live (Sep 2025)

  • Developed a backend MVP for a carbon credit trading platform aimed at restoring the carbon ecosystem.
  • Engineered secure user transaction flows using Django.
  • Implemented Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) to manage secure routing for Buyers, Sellers, and Admins.
  • Deployed the backend on Google App Engine with Cloud SQL (PostgreSQL).

Linux Workstation Configuration

Stack: Bash, Hyprland, Lua
Links: GitHub | About the site (Nov 2025 – Present)

  • Maintained a custom, highly reproducible Fedora/Wayland environment via Git, demonstrating strong Linux system-level proficiency.
  • Scripted automated system provisioning workflows in Bash to eliminate manual setup and reduce friction.
  • Configured a personalized Neovim IDE using Lua, integrating native LSPs and formatters.

Smart Tourist Safety System (Hackathon)

Role: Hackathon Team Project
Links: GitHub (Nov 2025)

  • Collaborated in a team of 4 to prototype a digital identity system concept for tourist safety.
  • Drove the product presentation and technical feasibility pitch, securing 4th place out of competing university teams.

Personal Website (Digital Garden)

Stack: Hugo, Go Templates, CSS
Links: GitHub (2026 – Present)

  • Architecting a high-performance static environment using Hugo, focusing on a zero-JavaScript architecture.
  • Engineering modular site components using Go template logic, creating reusable partials for dynamic tag clouds and automated post-navigation systems.
  • Optimized site architecture by relying entirely on pure CSS for responsive design, maximizing load speed and minimalism.

item.title: Contact & Links
item.description:
Feel free to reach out if you’re looking for a developer, want to collaborate on open source, or just want to chat about Linux or Neovim.

  • Email: jitendradara4464@gmail.com
  • LinkedIn: jitendradara12
  • GitHub: jitendradara12
  • Telegram: @sorrybutidonthavename

Coding Profiles

  • Leetcode: @sorrybutidonthavename
  • Codolio: @sorrybutidonthaveaname

item.title: About This Site
item.description: This website is meant to be a multipurpose place for being a portfolio, digital diary and much more. I’ll write stuff here about the software I use, the projects I’m planning or working on, the tools I like and how I configured them and a lot more.
